testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//button[normalize-space()='Add']"}.
